subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou ever abide beneath the shade of the blessed divine Lote-Tree, and stand firm in His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله همیشه ایام در ظل سدره مبارکه الهیه ساکن باشی و بر امرش مستقیم
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @firmness in the Covenant, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
